violations.text: (Ham and cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation.PIC informed of proper datemarking Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Queso de Hoja was observed being sold from an unapproved source. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were put in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

(Various food product) was observed held at (50-51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Inspector observed rodenticide being used in basement area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The thermometer in walk in cooler is in poor repair.Observed inaccurate ambient temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk in cooler and display cooler shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

The (walls ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes and unconstructed wall exposing wood frame. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The floors and walls in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
Refrigerator (milk) door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Sliced tomatoes/cabbage and cream cheese were observed held at 46-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Sauce packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Refrigerator (milk) door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

At the time of inspection, ambient of walk-in cooler was at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service, TCS foods relocated during inspection. PIC to send inspector proof of repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Three bay sink faucet was in poor repair, observed leak. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

The walls in the walk-in freezer area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (oregano) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Salami, sour cream and cheese were observed held at 46-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved product to another refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Cut vegetables and sauce packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Refrigerator (milk) door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of walk-in cooler was at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service, all TCS foods moved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The walls in the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
